# Nonbank

> Nonbank is a crypto-to-fiat Visa debit card and USDT wallet available as a Telegram mini-app, iOS/Android app, and web platform. Users can spend cryptocurrency at any Visa-accepting merchant in 60+ countries with real-time conversion and BTC cashback.

## Key Facts

- **Product:** Crypto Visa debit card + multi-currency USDT wallet
- **Platforms:** Telegram mini-app, iOS, Android, Web
- **Coverage:** 60+ countries including UK, UAE, EU, CIS, Southeast Asia
- **Cashback:** Up to 2% back in BTC on every purchase
- **Supported assets:** USDT, BTC, ETH — spend as EUR, GBP, USD
- **FX markup:** 0% on major currency pairs
- **Card issuance:** Virtual + physical Visa cards
- **B2B:** Corporate cards, business accounts, crypto payroll
- **Founded:** Estonia-based, EU-regulated
- **Website:** https://nonbank.io

## Use Cases

- Digital nomads spending crypto abroad without high FX fees
- Freelancers receiving USDT payments and spending via Visa
- Businesses issuing corporate crypto cards for team expenses
- Users in CIS, Middle East, and Europe converting crypto to local spending
- Cross-border payments with real-time USDT-to-fiat conversion

## Comparison with Competitors

| Feature | Nonbank | Crypto.com | Binance Card | Revolut |
|---------|------|------------|--------------|---------|
| Crypto cashback | 2% BTC | 1-5% CRO | 0-2% BNB | None |
| Telegram mini-app | Yes | No | No | No |
| FX markup | 0% | 0-2% | 0% | 0-1.5% |
| USDT wallet | Yes | Limited | Yes | No |
| Countries | 60+ | 40+ | 30+ | 35+ |
| Card type | Visa | Visa | Visa | Visa/Mastercard |

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://nonbank.io): Main landing page with product overview
- [Crypto Wallet](https://nonbank.io/cryptowallet): USDT wallet features
- [Buy Crypto](https://nonbank.io/buy-crypto): Purchase crypto with bank card
- [Exchanger](https://nonbank.io/exchanger): Swap between crypto assets
- [Countries](https://nonbank.io/countries): Supported countries list
- [For Business](https://nonbank.io/for-business/business): B2B crypto card solutions
- [Cashback](https://nonbank.io/cashback): BTC cashback program details
- [Blog](https://nonbank.io/blog): Crypto news, guides, and product updates
